name: Toledo
content: I made the mistake The type of mistake you make once in your life, not necessarily from ignorance, but simply because it is a mistake worth making once and only once. of getting an overnight train in coach class when I was traveling from rural New Hampshire to rural Michigan, which involved disembarking in Toledo in order to catch a bus to the Detroit airport. This was a mistake. I could not fall asleep on the train, and arrived in Toledo around sunrise, extremely sleep deprived and with nothing to do except wait until my 3 PM bus. Toledo itself was alright, the riverfront is a nice place to watch the sunrise. Ohio is a little weird but not terrible.
